description: Style NoteThe perfect blend of beauty and style, this handmade necklace from adrika adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a chic and bold look.Product DetailsChunky neck-piece with orange and green beads threaded with camel bone beads, metal claspMaterial and CareCamel bone beadsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 70 cm
